thinking.text:
The OCR quality is variable. Some frames produce good results, others are empty or have errors. The issue might be that the 1fps frames (frames3) are sometimes blank due to seeking issues. The HQ frames (frames_hq) seem to work better.

Let me look at the video directly - maybe I can use ffmpeg to capture specific frames with better quality. But first, let me examine the commands that were extracted and try to understand what the actual game commands should be.

This looks like a complete Zork I playthrough. The player started at West of House, got the mail, entered the house, got items, fought troll, went through the dungeon, etc.

But the commands have many OCR errors. I need to look at the actual frames more carefully to correct them. Let me examine some critical frames to verify commands.
